blended.narrative: Anthony Lakes is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 5,630 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 7 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 2.8" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 13".
